daily.today_energy: Your vibe is giving introspective innovator. The universe is whispering that today's the day to trust your unconventional instincts. Something's shifting—lean into it.
daily.love: Whether you're coupled or solo, authenticity is your superpower rn. Someone's noticing the real you, and that's exactly what matters. Stop dimming your light.
daily.career: Your ideas have legs today. That project or pitch you've been sitting on? The energy supports putting it out there. Your unique perspective is exactly what's needed.
daily.health: Your body's asking for movement that feels good, not punishment. Dance, walk, stretch—whatever makes you feel alive. Mental clarity follows when you honor what feels right.

weekly.overview: Mercury's doing its thing this week, bringing clarity to situations that felt foggy. You're entering a phase where your intuition is basically your superpower. Trust the weird hunches—they're actually onto something real.
weekly.love: If you're coupled up, this is a week for deeper conversations that actually hit different. Single? Someone might slide into your orbit who gets your vibe. Either way, authenticity is your love language rn.
weekly.career: Your creative energy is peaked this week. Ideas you've been sitting on are ready to breathe. Collaboration feels natural, so don't sleep on teamwork. The universe is basically saying your work matters.
weekly.health: Your body's asking for intentional rest, not forced productivity. Moving in ways that feel good (not what the algorithm says) will shift your whole energy. Hydration and sleep are underrated manifestation tools.
